---
title: 'Draft... some material I had, not sure what it''s for.. read it and use what you like.'
date: '2016-05-29T05:55:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe for Office'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '4707805024196535089'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/draft-some-material-i-had-not-sure-what.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe for Office/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
<br />
Basic Tenants<br />
Man is Fallen<br />
Mankind cannot be trusted on his own. He needs laws and rules.<br />
No organization, private or government can be trusted to do right at all times.<br />
Private organizations need over sight from government,<br />
Government needs oversight from private organizations.<br />
No institution, private or government, will be allowed to become so large that it is "Too Big To Fail".<br />
Monopoly rules will apply for both Private Organizations AND Government Programs.<br />
Both must be kept small and local. Largest coming to state level charters. With few exceptions there will be no Federally Chartered programs for Private or Government Organizations.<br />
Exceptions apply only to those things that require national attention.<br />
Military and National Defense<br />
Necessary National Laws<br />
Roads and Signs<br />
Limited National Monetary Policy, such as Currency.<br />
Ten Commandments for Today (<a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Exodus+20">Exodus 20</a>)<br />
You shall have no other Gods...<br />
The USA was founded by God's people to be free to worship Him. That is the first and primary reason for the United States.<br />
Any policy that works against that is a policy that works against free religious expression is a violation of the very reason for the USA to exist. If you are offended at someones religious expression. Don't watch. Don't listen. Don't attend. Don't try to stop it.<br />
ONLY exception: if it causes PHYSICAL harm to another human being. (Mental, Emotion, harm does not count)<br />
You shall not an image of anything above heaven, on earth, or below earth, to bow to, worship, serve, etc...<br />
Nature is God's creation, created FOR mankind. We are to tend to it, care for it, as outlined in Genesis 1-3.<br />
Nature is FOR MAN. And anyone with any concept of responsibility knows that when you are given something you should treat it well and care for it, not abuse it. If you abuse it you will loose it. Nature should be cared for.<br />
However: Nature is NOT to be served. There should at NO time be a situation where the policy of the USA puts the perceived "needs" of nature (trees, animals, space, oceans, or any other natural thing) above the needs of Mankind. Human rights always over ride natures rights, always.<br />
These two concepts. Care for what you are given. But dont' serve what you are given. Must find balance in our policies. We cannot allow man to destroy nature to make a dollar. But we cannot stop mankind from benefiting and put nature above man in priorities.<br />
You shall not misuse the name of God...<br />
Don't blame God for the Curse<br />
First: Insurance policies must remove "Acts of God" from their policies. It is not in God's nature to cause devastation. God is out to bless and not curse (Deut 28).<br />
That is Satan's nature. Therefore if Insurance Policies want to rename these devastations "Acts of Satan" they may do so.<br />
Don't blame God for People's Stupidity<br />
Free Religious Exercise doesn't include the physical harm of people. Forced marriages of under age women is not free exercise of religion it's child abuse. It is a misuse of the name of God.<br />
Remember the Sabbath and keep it holy...<br />
Government Offices will remain closed on Saturdays and Sundays to respect both Jewish and Christian versions of Sabbath.<br />
Government Offices will remain closed on all national holidays to give people a time to reflect and respect.<br />
Honor your Father and Mother that you may live long in the land...<br />
The Father and Mother shall be the preferred family unit in the land.<br />
When the choice is available having one father and one mother for each child is preferred.<br />
When this is not available (Father/Mother is passed way, in jail, etc)<br />
The child's remaining natural parent will be preferred.<br />
When no natural parent is available.<br />
The expressed written will of the Parents will be upheld.<br />
The child closest qualified-healthy willing relative parents (Man and Woman) of CHILD REARING AGE should be preferred.<br />
Aunts/Uncles would be preferred over grandparents.<br />
You shall not murder.<br />
What is NOT murder:<br />
Death is natural.<br />
Death caused by accidents is not murder.<br />
Death caused by Capitol Punishment is not murder.<br />
Death caused through Righteous Acts of Protection (Police, Self Defense, Defense of another, Righteous War) is not murder.<br />
What IS Murder:<br />
Death caused through the willful act of another without just legal cause.<br />
You shall not commit adultery.<br />
Adultery would be a Federal Crime.<br />
Treated legally much the same way as a breach of contract, or insider trading is.<br />
Fine-able. Possible Jail Time. Possibly requiring certifies Marriage Counseling.<br />
Marriage shall be upheld with high esteem. Only people passing a qualified program should be issued a marriage license. It should be harder to obtain a marriage license than a gun license or drivers license.<br />
Mandatory Marriage counseling will be required before divorce decrees will be issued.<br />
Divorce will only be issued after all attempts to reconcile and repair have been followed through and failed.<br />
Exceptions would be given where:<br />
The safety of one person (Emotionally, Mentally, Physically, Etc) is in Jeopardy.<br />
One party is unavailable to participate or deemed by court to be un-repairable. (Ex: Convicted Murderer)<br />
You shall not steal.<br />
Theft includes any violation of another's rights or property.<br />
Unfair Taxes are theft and therefore the Government will have certain limits to the extent of programs or tax laws.<br />
Theft will include paying back the stolen item plus interest.<br />
Theft will be held as a high crime with no bail or plea bargains.<br />
You shall not give false testimony against your brother.<br />
Perjury in court will require jail time and fines.<br />
Perjury on documents will also.<br />
You shall not covet your neighbors... stuff...<br />
Just because you want what you neighbor has doesn't mean you have a right to it.<br />
It is not the responsibility of the government to give you things, only to protect you and provide an environment for you to flourish.<br />
ALL programs of government assistance will be privatized and decentralized, put back into the hands of the people closest to the region. Government office may oversee, protect against abuse, provide incentives and some limited funding. No official government representative or department will deal in assistance programs directly.<br />
Government WILL assist and facilitate environments for growth. Helping YOU take responsibility for YOUR growth. Education, Resources, Job Fairs, Trainings, will all be provided for in partnership with private local organizations, not directly by government employees.<br />
Exceptions: Only those deemed completely unable to fend for themselves in severe cases (mentally ill, elderly, severe physically disabled) will be provided direct monetary assistance, again with the help and oversight of local private organizations.<br />
Rights<br />
Responsibilities</div>
<br />
<div>
</div>
<br />
<div style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;">
<div style="margin: 0px;">
<br /></div>
</div>
